title: Uncertainty Clouds Cease-Fire as Lebanon and Gulf States Are Struck
summary_full: A day after a pause in fighting was announced between the United States and Iran, many questions remained, including the status of the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: A day after a pause in fighting was announced between the United States and Iran, many questions remained, including the status of the Strait of Hormuz.
